CustomField.description: Runtime formula expression evaluated per record using the FormulaEval namespace. When the formula returns true, the action executes for that record; when false, the record is excluded. Supports field references via context variables (e.g. newRecord.Status). Requires a Context Class Name for custom objects.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Optional formula evaluated per record. Action only runs on records where the formula is true. Use field references like newRecord.Status or oldRecord.Amount. Leave blank to run on all records.
CustomField.label: Entry Criteria Formula
